## What changed

Describe the user-facing and technical outcome.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] Frontend lint and type check pass
- [ ] Frontend production build passes
- [ ] Tenant isolation was considered for organization-owned data
- [ ] Desktop and mobile behavior were checked for UI changes
- [ ] No secrets or PII were committed

## Promotion

Target branches follow: `feat/*` → `dev` → `stage` → `main`.
